title: Amtech L4850 Mains Voltage Tester
features: EASY AND SAFE TO USE: This mains voltage tester is ideal for quick, efficient and safe domestic electrical fault finding and features a visual voltage indicator
VERSATILE: The tool can be used to test bulbs and fuses, locate cable break points, verify DC polarity, the presence of AC voltages (contact testing) and more
PLEASE NOTE: This product is not suitable for outdoor use or in areas of high humidity/moisture
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x all weather voltage tester See more
